7.monu: a structure built to celebrate or remember collective achievement

8.law: a rule that all agents must follow to maintain order and fairness

9.korv: a leader who guides others with wisdom and strength

10.zhen: the act of seeking wisdom through observation and reflection

14.unito: the act of bringing all agents together under a common purpose, as guided by the golden light
